mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.member_id, n.gym_id, n.author_id, n.content, n.created_at, u.name AS author_name FROM crm_member_notes n LEFT JOIN crm_users u ON u.id = n.author_id WHERE n.member_id = #{memberId} AND n.gym_id = #{gymId} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO crm_member_notes (id, member_id, gym_id, author_id, content, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{memberId}, #{gymId}, #{authorId}, #{content}, NOW())
INSERT INTO crm_member_tags (id, member_id, gym_id, tag, color, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{memberId}, #{gymId}, #{tag}, #{color}, NOW())

INSERT INTO crm_member_assignments (id, member_id, trainer_id, gym_id, assigned_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{memberId}, #{trainerId}, #{gymId}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE trainer_id = #{trainerId}, assigned_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT h.id, h.member_id, h.gym_id, h.action, h.reason, h.processed_by, h.created_at, u.name AS processed_by_name FROM crm_membership_history h LEFT JOIN crm_users u ON u.id = h.processed_by WHERE h.member_id = #{memberId} AND h.gym_id = #{gymId} ORDER BY h.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO crm_membership_history (id, member_id, gym_id, action, reason, processed_by, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{memberId}, #{gymId}, #{action}, #{reason}, #{processedBy}, NOW())
